allow: Bash(sed -i '45a\\\\n    public List<String> generatePreviewImages\(Long draftId, String canvasId\) throws IOException, InterruptedException {\\n        Path pdfPath = exportPdf\(draftId, canvasId\);\\n        if \(!Files.exists\(pdfPath\)\) throw new RuntimeException\("预览生成失败"\);\\n        List<String> images = new ArrayList<>\(\);\\n        try \(PDDocument document = Loader.loadPDF\(pdfPath.toFile\(\)\)\) {\\n            PDFRenderer renderer = new PDFRenderer\(document\);\\n            for \(int i = 0; i < document.getNumberOfPages\(\); i++\) {\\n                BufferedImage image = renderer.renderImageWithDPI\(i, 150\);\\n                ByteArrayOutputStream baos = new ByteArrayOutputStream\(\);\\n                ImageIO.write\(image, "png", baos\);\\n                images.add\("data:image/png;base64," + Base64.getEncoder\(\).encodeToString\(baos.toByteArray\(\)\)\);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return images;\\n    }' src/main/java/com/genealogy/server/service/VrainExportService.java)

Bash(sed -i '18s/.*/import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;\\nimport org.apache.pdfbox.Loader;\\nimport org.apache.pdfbox.pdmodel.PDDocument;\\nimport org.apache.pdfbox.rendering.PDFRenderer;\\nimport javax.imageio.ImageIO;\\nimport java.awt.image.BufferedImage;\\nimport java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;/' src/main/java/com/genealogy/server/service/VrainExportService.java)
